events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: instruments not isolated before hydro testing. Per ASME B31.3 §345, instruments that cannot withstand test pressure must be isolated/removed before pressure testing. This is a sequence violation - instruments should be isolated before hydro. Work is in progress, so this is a fail.
